message:
fix: checkDoltLocks returns error instead of masking connection failures (bd-gzu5)

checkDoltLocks previously returned (false, "") when openDoltConn or the
dolt_status query failed, which callers interpreted as "no locks detected."
Now returns (bool, string, error) so callers can distinguish "no locks"
from "check failed" and surface appropriate warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/obsidian
